sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43190" key="e(tero/plokos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑτερό-πλοκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n43190.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">irregularly combined</tr_>, Diom.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0068.tlg001:p.481" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.481</biblScope> </bibl> K.</sense> </entryFree>
